name: Yuri
description:
Yuri is a young girl that has a crush on [Light Yagami](https://anilist.co/character/80/Light-Yagami). 

Light decides to invite her on a date to Space Land. He asks her out as part of his plan to help find out [Raye Penber's](https://anilist.co/character/7044) name, so that he can write it in the Death Note. Light asks her out so that he won't arouse suspicion, since he is well aware of being followed by Penber.
